metadata.title:
G. N. ORDERS MOTORS


FOR TUNNEL HAUL

pages.raw_text:
The Great Northern has ordered
four 100-ton electric locomotives to
be used in handling it's trains
through the Cascade tunnel. The
locomotives will be delivered next
spring, when, according to the
plans of the engineers, the big
power dam in the Cascades will
be finished.


Each locomotive will be equip
ped with four motors rated at 325
horsepower, or total of 1900
horsepower. The driving wheels
are 60 inches in diameter. Elec-
trio current from the power plant
will be supplied to the locomotives
at $500 volts, and at a frequency
of 25 cycles. Each locomotive will
be capable of hauling a 1,000-ton
train at a speed of Is miles an
hour on 2 per cent grade.
